table.sql: insert ignore into CAJCOMPR (siscod, ctacod, ctanom, movfec, movvto, concod, movlet, movnpv, movnro, movimp, movsal, movicc, movipv,movinc, nrocom, movord) select CCT.siscod, CCT.ctacod, '[__ctanom__]', CCT.movfec, CCT.movvto, CCT.concod, CCT.movlet, CCT.movnpv, CCT.movnro, CCT.movimp, CCT.movsal, [__concod__], '[__movnpv__]', (select parent from CAJPARAM where parcla = 'nropag' limit 1), (select parent from CAJPARAM where parcla = 'nropag' limit 1) , CCT.id_regmovim from CCTMOVIM CCT where CCT.id_regmovim in ([__numfac__]);
